steps.title: Spot the collective designation
steps.content: The underlined phrase introduces a group name: “known collectively as the silversword alliance.” The word “collectively” signals a group-level name, not an individual plant name.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content: The phrase supplies the collective name used to refer to a group of related plant species. The other three choices misidentify what the phrase names—claiming it lists species, explains uniqueness, or refers to the individual plant. That matches choice D — D is correct.
